title: The Robot Vacuum
content: My family recently bought a robot vacuum cleaner. The small device moves around the house and cleans the floors automatically. At first, I watched it carefully because I was curious about how it worked. It avoided furniture, changed direction when necessary, and returned to its charging station when the battery became low. The robot saves time because it cleans while we do other activities. Although it cannot replace deep cleaning, it helps keep the house tidy throughout the week.
